name: Taco Casserole .
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Jalapeno relish; or bean dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry meat and onions until cooked through, then drain.
2. Spread beans in a 10x13 dish.
3. Top with meat mixture.
4. Sprinkle with green chilies.
5. Add cheese and drizzle with taco sauce.
6. Chill if desired.
7. Bake uncovered at 400°F for 20-25 minutes.
8. When done and slightly cooled, spread quacamole and sprinkle with lettuce, olives, green onions, and tomato.
9. Serve with corn chips.
